title: Creating an Agent's Communication Protocol
scenario: Write a short statement that describes a conversational AI agent's communication protocol that is no more than 30 words. The statement should be written in a formal tone and should include the agent's goal and the type of interactions it supports.
constraints: Must be no more than 30 words
Must be written in a formal tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 30-word limit and is written in a formal tone.
